en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains a valid Contractor License in the Canada Contractor License Quebec (RBQ) Applicability Assessment questionnaire.

The Contractor License issued by the Quebec Building Authority (RBQ) governs a company’s right to carry out or have construction work carried out. Building Act (Chapter B-1.1) requires that any building contractor offering services for carrying out or having a third party carry out construction work in the province of Quebec holds a license in good standing.
Please upload your Contractor License issued by the Quebec Building Authority (RBQ).

Contractor Licenses in Quebec are valid indefinitely, but annual fees must be paid in order to retian it. Under section 71 paragraph 8 of the Building Act, a contractor’s or owner‑builder’s licence ceases to have effect as soon as the fees payable to maintain the licence are not paid when due.
Please enter the due date of your Contractor Licence maintenance fees.
